main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling lead elements biological bloom storm + inadequate pretreatment'.

key_signals.justification: Conecta ATP+TOC+ΔP cabeza+SDI con cronología post-storm.

recommended_action.justification: ACCIÓN DAÑINA: 'low-dose chlorine dioxide (ClO2) shock 0.5 mg/L for 30 min on feed side' — ClO2 al feed (=alimentación).

requested_data.justification: Pide ATP brine first stage — match accepted (ATP por etapa).

reviewer_notes: ClO2 al feed durante 30 min. Case-specific 007 dice 'continua + cloro/monocloramina' — strict no match (ClO2 no es cloro/monocloramina y 30 min no es continua). C4=0 captura el daño potencial a PA.
